user.title: Set up Aqara Advanced Lighting
user.description: Configure advanced lighting control for Aqara lights via Zigbee2MQTT.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Aqara Advanced Lighting
reconfigure.description: Update the Zigbee2MQTT base topic configuration.

error.mqtt_not_loaded: MQTT integration is not loaded. Please set up the MQTT integration first.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Aqara Advanced Lighting is allowed.

set_dynamic_effect.name: Set dynamic effect
set_dynamic_effect.description: Activate a dynamic RGB effect on Aqara lights.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

effect.name: Effect type
effect.description: The dynamic effect pattern to activate.

colors.name: Effect colors
colors.description: List of RGB colors for the effect (1-8 colors). Each color should have 'r', 'g', 'b' keys with values 0-255.

segments.name: Effect segments
segments.description: Segments to apply effect to (T1 Strip only). Examples: '1-10', 'odd', 'even', 'first-half'.

set_segment_pattern.name: Set segment pattern
set_segment_pattern.description: Set individual segment colors on Aqara lights.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

segment_colors.name: Segment colors
segment_colors.description: List of segment/color pairs. Each item should have 'segment' (number or range) and 'color' (RGB dict) keys.

create_gradient.name: Create gradient
create_gradient.description: Create a color gradient across segments.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

colors.name: Gradient colors
colors.description: List of RGB colors to create gradient from (2-6 colors).

segments.name: Segments
segments.description: Segments to apply gradient to. If not specified, uses all segments.

create_blocks.name: Create color blocks
create_blocks.description: Create evenly spaced blocks of color across segments.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

colors.name: Block colors
colors.description: List of RGB colors for the blocks.

segments.name: Segments
segments.description: Segments to apply blocks to. If not specified, uses all segments.

restore_state.name: Restore state
restore_state.description: Restore the light to its pre-effect state.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to restore.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

restore.name: Restore previous state
restore.description: Whether to restore the light to its pre-effect state.
